questions.question: Why is agriculture considered a primary activity?
questions.answer: Because it involves direct use of natural resources.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of subsistence farming?
questions.answer: To produce food for family consumption.

questions.question: What distinguishes commercial farming from subsistence farming?
questions.answer: Commercial farming produces crops mainly for sale.

questions.question: Which physical factor determines crop growth most directly?
Which human factor improves agricultural productivity?
Which crop season begins with the monsoon in India?
Which crop is commonly grown in the Rabi season?
Which short-season crops grow between Rabi and Kharif?
Which food crop requires heavy rainfall?
Which crop is a major raw material for the textile industry?
Which crop provides raw material for sugar production?
Which type of farming involves a single crop on large estates?
Name one plantation crop grown in India.
What is the main purpose of irrigation?
questions.answer: To supply water to crops when rainfall is insufficient.

questions.question: Which machine helps farmers plough fields faster?
Which substances improve soil fertility?
What chemicals are used to protect crops from pests?
Which farming method avoids chemical fertilizers?
Which farming practice helps maintain soil fertility naturally?
Which environmental issue can result from excessive farming?
Which irrigation method saves water by supplying it directly to plant roots?
Which global issue is affecting agricultural productivity?
Which type of crop is grown mainly for sale and export?
Which activity connects agriculture with industries?
What is the main goal of sustainable agriculture?
questions.answer: To protect natural resources while maintaining productivity.
